# Take 5 - Shared Preferences - Flutter

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/U2jdTCMBTgE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

Source Code: https://github.com/rodydavis/flutter_take_5

In this video I talk about how to get started with Shared Preferences in Flutter. We will setup dark mode, and a fresh install check for our application.

Website: https://rodydavis.com
Twitter: @rodydavis
Github: @rodydavis
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/rodydavis
